title: Create Rocket Alternative - Obsidian Propeller
description: Adds an obsidian propeller as an alternative to rockets for the create mod
body:
Adds an alternative to Elytra rockets for the create mod by adding obsidian rockets that can be made 100% automatically with no user inputs(with some work). Right now there is no crafting recipe built into the mod as I wanted people to use their imagination to create a craft that works best for them. Crafting can be added using a datapack. As of right now all this mod adds is the item, the crafting recipe you have to decide. There are resources online to help with normal crafting and looking at Create mod data files can help with Create crafting.

Note: Also adds a "useless" incomplete version of the item to allow more room for creativity. I recommend deploying, pressing, filling, or a sequenced assembly of all 3..

Example: Fill brass sheet with lava to make the base, deploy propeller on to finish item.

However, because Create is not a dependency for this mod, you could also add a vanilla or alternative mod crafting recipe. 

To look at mod crafting recipes:
Download the mod
Extract the jar to a folder(on windows change the ending to .zip before doing so)))
go to the folders: (data>modname>recipes)
The jsons will have examples that you can use in a data pack
